    B

    build(Album) - Method in class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.presentation.libraryViews.AlbumViewBuilder
    Builds and returns the complete album detail VBox for the given album.
    build(String) - Method in class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.presentation.libraryViews.FavouritesViewBuilder
    Builds and returns the complete Favourites view.
    build(List, String, boolean, List, String, boolean, VBox, String, String, Runnable) - Static method in class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.presentation.shared.SidebarBuilder
    Builds a complete sidebar VBox.
    buildAlbumArt(int) - Static method in class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.utils.AppUtils
     
    buildAlbumGridView(List, Runnable, Consumer) - Method in class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.presentation.libraryViews.SongViewBuilder
    Builds a TilePane card grid of albums.
    buildAllArtistsRankedData() - Method in class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.presentation.Analytics.viewmodel.TopArtistsViewModel
    Builds all artist rows for the analytics modal synchronously, ranked by total listening time descending.
    buildArtistDetail(Artist, String, Runnable) - Method in class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.presentation.libraryViews.ArtistViewBuilder
    Builds the artist detail view, consisting of a back-navigation header followed by the artist's albums in either grid or list layout.
    buildArtistList(List, Consumer) - Method in class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.presentation.libraryViews.ArtistViewBuilder
    Builds a scrollable, alphabetically grouped list of artists.
    buildChart(Map, Map, Map, int, Integer, Integer, boolean, boolean) - Method in class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.presentation.graph.DashboardLineChartBuilder
    Time Complexity: O(m * s) — m = 12 months (constant), s ≤ 3 series = O(1) effectively Space Complexity: O(m * s) = O(1)
    buildChartTitle(int, Integer, Integer, boolean, boolean) - Method in class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.presentation.graph.DashboardLineChartBuilder
     
    buildDialogGrid() - Static method in class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.utils.AppUtils
     
    buildGridView(List) - Method in class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.presentation.libraryViews.SongViewBuilder
    Builds a song card grid using SortStrategy.ALPHABETICAL.
    buildGridView(List, SortStrategy) - Method in class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.presentation.libraryViews.SongViewBuilder
    Builds a TilePane card grid of songs sorted by the given strategy.
    buildListView(List) - Method in class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.presentation.libraryViews.SongViewBuilder
    Builds a grouped, scrollable song list using SortStrategy.ALPHABETICAL.
    buildListView(List, SortStrategy) - Method in class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.presentation.libraryViews.SongViewBuilder
    Builds a scrollable list of songs grouped under A–Z section dividers, with a vertical AlphabetBar on the right that jumps to each section.
    buildNavButton(String, String) - Static method in class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.presentation.shared.SidebarBuilder
    Builds a single nav button with icon + label.
    buildPlaylistBrowser(List, String) - Method in class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.presentation.playlist.PlaylistViewBuilder
    Renders all user playlists as either a card grid or a list of rows.
    buildRow(Album) - Static method in class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.presentation.libraryViews.AlbumCardListCell
    Builds and returns a standalone HBox row for the given album, without requiring a ListView context.
    buildSection(VBox, String, String, Runnable, Consumer) - Static method in class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.presentation.Analytics.AnalyticsSectionBuilder
    Clears centerContent, then adds a title, an action button, and a styled preview container.
    buildSidebarNewButton() - Method in class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.presentation.playlist.PlaylistViewBuilder
    Returns a VBox containing only the "+ New Playlist" button.
    buildSongPanel(Playlist, String) - Method in class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.presentation.playlist.PlaylistViewBuilder
    Renders the selected playlist's info, action buttons, and its songs.
    buildStatSnapshot() - Method in class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.service.handlers.DailyListeningStatsService
    Builds all stat-card values from a single database fetch.
    buildTopArtistsData(int) - Method in class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.presentation.Analytics.viewmodel.TopArtistsViewModel
    Builds and returns a ranked list of top artist rows synchronously, ranked by total listening time descending, bounded to limit rows.
    buildView(int, VBox) - Method in class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.presentation.Analytics.YearWrappedViewController
     
    busiestMonthName() - Method in class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.presentation.Analytics.viewmodel.YearEndReportViewModel.WrappedData
    Used to show the month with the most playback hours.
